mapper.select: SELECT 'TASK' AS event_type, CAST(t.task_id AS VARCHAR) AS event_id, t.task_title AS title, t.start_date, t.due_date AS end_date, t.task_status AS status, p.project_name FROM schedule_task t INNER JOIN schedule_project p ON p.project_id = t.project_id WHERE t.assignee_user_id = #{viewer_user_id} AND to_char(COALESCE(t.due_date, t.start_date), 'YYYY-MM') = #{target_month} ORDER BY start_date, event_type, event_id
